name: superteam-codex
description: Complete Codex-native SuperTeam G1-G7 runtime with internal hook-trace, TDD, UI restoration, review, verification, repair-loop, and finish gates.

interface.longDescription: SuperTeam Codex is a complete Codex-native rewrite of the SuperTeam workflow. It exposes thin skills backed by a Python runtime that drives one global event tree from G1 through G7, guides agents before work through hook-trace, binds spawned roles to original SuperTeam agent definitions, enforces G4 TDD and UI-contract evidence, returns G5/G6 failures to G4 repair, and closes with verifier PASS plus finish artifacts.
defaultPrompt: Run the full G1-G7 SuperTeam Codex workflow on this task.
Advance the active SuperTeam Codex hook-trace event.
Verify this delivery against the feature, UI, test, and finish gates.
